info.name: Affiliate payment
info.description: ## Authentication 1. combine your API username and password into a single string, separated by a colon. For example, `username:password`. 2. Encode the combined string in base64 format. 3. Include the base64-encoded string in the `Authorization` header of your API request in the following format: `Authorization: Basic {base64_encoded_username_password}`. 4. header AccessAffiliateNumber string required This is the agent correspondent id provided to the agent by the admin department. It is used to facilitate API management and auditing. For example: If the agent's username is `ABC00000001` and the current password is `ABC123` and a new password is `Password123!` then Base64 encoding should be applied to the value `AE00000001:Password123!` `Authorization: Basic QUUwMDAwMDAwMTpBQkMxMjM6UGFzc3dvcmQxMjMh` `AccessAffiliateNumber:1062` ### Authentication error response If an API key is missing, malformed, or invalid, you will receive an HTTP 401 Unauthorized response code. # **Notification Types and Details** ### **User Onboarding** **Notification Type: USER_ONBOARDING****Body:**Name: vakilsingh**Email:** [opeadeoye@gmail.com](https://mailto:opeadeoye@gmail.com)** Account Number: 234687** ### ** Transaction Created** **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_CREATED****Body:**Reference Number: 31000521**Amount: $10****Status: pending** ** Payment Captured** **Notification Type: PAYMENT_CAPTURED****Body:**Reference Number: 31000486**Amount: $100.00****Status: pending** Transaction Completed **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_COMPLETED****Body:**Partner Reference Number: 54933785222**Reference Number: 31000486**Amount: $100.00**Status: completed** Transaction Under Review **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_UNDERREVIEW****Body:**Reference Number: 31000490**Amount: $10.00****Status: pending** Transaction Underpay Refund **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_UNDERPAY_REFUND****Body:**Refund Reference Number: 31000488**Amount: $50.00****Status: pending** ### ** Transaction Failed** **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_FAILED****Body:**Partner Reference Number: 54925222**Reference Number: 31000487**Amount: $100.00**Status: failed** Transaction Underpay Refund Notification Type: TRANSACTION_UNDERPAY_REFUND Body: Refund Reference Number: 31000484 Amount: $50.00 Status: pending Bank Account Verification Failed **Notification Type: BANK_ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION_FAILED****Body:**Partner Reference Number: 549785**Reference Number: 31000481**Amount: $102.00**Status: failed** ### Transaction Expired **Notification Type: TRANSACTION_EXPIRED****Body:**Partner Reference Number: 32135444**Reference Number: 31000478**Amount: $102.00**Status: failed**

request.description:
#### Request Parameters | Field | | Type | Description | Examples | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | sendAmount | `_required_` | double | The amount money to be remitted | 100.00 | | partnerRefernceNumber | `_required_` | String | A unique reference for the transaction | 2113123 | | senderAccountNumber | | Number | Sender's identifier.
If it doesn't set a new entity will be created.
Once generated then it is require to store in agent’s system and send the same for futures transaction for same remitter. | 21015 | | senderFirstName | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | FirstName | | | senderMiddleName | `Optional` | String | MiddleName | | | senderLastName | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | LastName | | | senderGender | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | The sender Gender | M/F | | senderMobileNumber | `Optional` | String | The sender phone number | | | senderEmail | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | The sender Email | | | senderAddressBuildingNumber | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | BuildingNumber | | | senderAddressStreet | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | Street | | | senderAddressCity | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | AddressCity | | | senderAddressPostcode | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | String | Address
Postcode | | | senderDateOfBirth | `Conditional rules: Mandatory`
`if sender Account Number is null.` | date | DateOfBirth | 1995-01-01 | | callbackurl | `optional` | String | url | [https://webhook.site/e136dc4f-e945-4d71-9234-4cb4b245714d](https://webhook.site/e136dc4f-e945-4d71-9234-4cb4b245714d) | | expire_time | `Mandatory` | datetime | yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ | yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ | | payment_Mode | `Mandatory` | String | CARDCHECKOUT | |
